raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, of XXXX  I was charged {$1100.00} for membership fees for my credit card. At that time I contacted Barclays and downgraded my card membership to the basic fees which they immediately charge my card for and told me they were going to issue a refund for the {$1100.00} in charges. About three weeks afterwards I called back and they still had not resolved the issue or credited my card back yet for the {$1100.00} but they told me that would be resolved in the next billing cycle so I called them again today XX/XX/year> and spoke with the quote manager quote on duty and she indicated that there is some sort of issue happening and that they do not know when the card will be credited back the amount of {$1100.00} for the fees. 

I would like the credit card fees of {$1100.00} to be credited back immediately and I would like for an additional credit to be applied to my account for the inconvenience of having to wait and constantly follow up with Barclays credit card to make sure the {$1100.00} they took from me will be followed up on because they have not taken action on their end to keep me notified as the consumer
